title: Curve Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: DNS hijack leading to user approvals of malicious contracts

prevention.rule: Block any tx that approves a contract with known malicious addresses

red_flags: Approval of a contract with a known malicious address
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that approves a contract with known malicious addresses
summary: Curve Finance's front-end was hijacked, prompting users to approve a malicious contract, resulting in approximately $575k being stolen. A guard could have blocked approvals to the known malicious contract address.
